scope_summary.problem: requirements.md R1-R6: Add [sdd.test] config with TestConfig/TestScope structs, TOML parsing, and config entries for conductor and cclab-queue.
scope_summary.success_criteria: requirements.md acceptance: config round-trips through TOML serialize/deserialize, glob patterns stored as strings. Pre-clarifications: global test_cmd default inherited by scopes, gitignore-style globs via globset.

in_scope: test-config-spec (modify platform.md — TestConfig/TestScope structs, [sdd.test] TOML section, config.toml entries)
constraints: Follows DocsConfig/DocsTarget struct pattern in models/change.rs
[sdd.test] optional section — like [sdd.docs], no validation error when absent
TestScope.changes stores Vec<String> (glob patterns), matching deferred to PR2
